common..settings_save_failed: Couldn't save your changes. Check your connection and try again.
common..delete_account_warning_body: Your account and the data tied to it will be deleted. You cannot undo this from the app.
common..delete_account_keep_body: Keep my recordings (anonymized, unlinked from my identity) to train the speech-therapy AI.
common..delete_account_type_to_confirm: To confirm, type {{phrase}} in the box below.
common..delete_account_failed: Couldn't delete your account. Check your connection and try again.
common..help_getting_started_body: Welcome to UpSpeech! Your therapist will assign exercises and set up your learning path. Start by checking the Home tab for today's exercises.
common..help_exercises_body: Each exercise is part of your learning path. Tap on a step to see its exercises, then tap an exercise to begin. Some exercises involve recording audio or video — make sure to grant camera and microphone permissions when asked.
common..help_recordings_body: When you record audio or video during an exercise, the recording is uploaded automatically in the background. You can submit your exercise while the upload is still in progress.
common..help_progress_body: Your progress is shown on the Home tab (completion rate, streak) and the Journey tab (milestone timeline). Your therapist can see your progress and provide feedback.
common..help_practice_body: The Practice tab lets you do extra practice outside your learning path. Browse exercises by technique and practice at your own pace.
common..help_notifications_body: Enable push notifications to get reminders about new exercises, therapist feedback, and practice streaks. You can manage notification permissions in your device settings.
common..help_account_body: From the Profile tab you can edit your name, change your password, switch language, and toggle dark mode. Your therapist manages your clinic assignment.
common..help_contact_body: Contact your therapist or clinic for questions about your therapy plan. For technical issues, reach out to your clinic administrator.
common..scenarios_empty_description: Your therapist will assign AI-powered scenario practice when you're ready.
common..offline_queued: Saved offline — will upload when connected.
common..patients_empty_description: Tap "Invite Patient" above to bring your first patient on board.
common..invite_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
common..invite_send_failed: Failed to send invitation. Please try again.
common..invite_share_message: You've been invited to UpSpeech! Sign up here: {{link}}
common..therapist_feedback_no_target: This patient has no practiced step to attach feedback to yet.
common..coach_empty: Ask the AI coach for guidance.
common..coach_empty_description: Get help with therapy techniques, patient approaches, and clinical questions.
common..onboarding_patient_watch_video_d: A quick tour to help you feel at home
common..onboarding_patient_view_learning: Explore your therapy journey and goals
common..onboarding_patient_record_sessio: Capture a practice session to track your progress
common..onboarding_therapist_view_patien: See your patient list and their progress
common..onboarding_therapist_send_feedba: Give feedback on a patient's step
common..onboarding_therapist_try_coach_d: Ask the coach for clinical guidance
common..chat_empty_description: Get help with techniques, exercises, and your speech therapy journey.
common..chat_send_failed: Couldn't send — your message is still here. Try again.
common..therapist_home_recent_empty_hint: Assign exercises to your patients to see their activity here.
common..analytics_no_access_hint: Your account doesn't have access to analytics. Ask an administrator if you need it.
common..assessment_intro: Before you begin, we need a short speech sample. This helps your therapist understand your starting point.
common..assessment_consent: I understand and consent to the recording.
common..assessment_reading_instructions: Please read the following passage aloud. Record yourself for about 2 minutes.
common..assessment_monologue_instruction: Talk freely about a topic of your choice for at least 2 minutes.
common..assessment_complete_description: Your therapist will review your recordings. You can now use the app.
common..reports_empty_description: Your therapist will generate clinical reports as you progress. Keep practicing!
common..review_empty_hint: Your practice attempts and feedback will show up here once you complete this step.
common..practice_record_instructions: Record yourself practicing this exercise. When done, submit your recording.
common..practice_difficulty_description: Rate the difficulty of this exercise.
common..consent_terms_body: By participating in this program, you agree to use UpSpeech in accordance with its intended purpose as a speech therapy support tool. Your usage data may be collected in anonymized form to improve the platform. You may withdraw at any time by contacting your administrator.
common..consent_privacy_body: UpSpeech collects audio recordings, exercise data, and usage analytics to provide speech therapy services. Your data is stored securely, encrypted at rest and in transit. Personal data is never shared with third parties without your explicit consent. Audio recordings are processed for speech analysis and clinical reporting purposes only.
common..welcome_description: Your therapist has set up your therapy journey. Here's what you can do:
common..welcome_step_journey: Follow your learning path step by step
common..welcome_step_exercises: Practice exercises at your own pace
common..welcome_step_recordings: Record yourself and track your progress
common..technique_rating_description: Rate your experience with this exercise.
common..scenario_practice_description: Practice your techniques in a realistic AI-powered conversation scenario.
common..disclosure_level_1: The other person is patient and supportive.
common..disclosure_level_3: The other person is slightly rushed, creating realistic pressure.
common..practice_with_therapist: Practice this step with your therapist's guidance. They'll mark it complete when you're ready to move on.
common..step_patient_ready: Your therapist has approved this step. Continue when you're ready.
common..step_complete_failed: Couldn't mark this step complete. Try again in a moment.
common..acknowledgment_journey_subtitle: Congratulations! You've completed your therapy journey.
common..milestone_questionnaire_descript: You've completed {{title}}. Take a moment to reflect on your progress.
common..milestone_q_confidence: How confident do you feel about the techniques you practiced in this milestone?
common..milestone_q_comfort: How comfortable are you applying these techniques in daily conversations?
common..milestone_q_reflection: What has been the most helpful part of this milestone for you?
common..cbsa_onboarding_title: One quick step before we begin
common..cbsa_onboarding_description: These questions help us personalize your exercises and track your progress from day one.
common..cbsa_encouragement: Take your time. There are no right or wrong answers.
common..cbsa_success_description: Your responses have been recorded and shared with your therapist.
common..cbsa_submit_error: Couldn't save your answers. Check your connection and try again.
common..cbsa_q1: How severe was your stuttering over the last week?
common..cbsa_q2: How often did you change, substitute or avoid words when you anticipated you might stutter?
common..cbsa_q3: To what extent did you feel physical tension while speaking last week?
common..cbsa_q4: How much energy did you spend focusing on how you were speaking rather than what you wanted to say?
common..cbsa_q5: How often did you avoid or want to avoid a conversation because of fear of stuttering?
common..cbsa_q6: How would you rate your level of anxiety while speaking?
common..cbsa_q7: How would you score your speech overall last week?
common..cbsa_q8: How would you rate the impact of stuttering on your school/work?
common..cbsa_q9: How would you rate the impact of stuttering on your social life?
common..cbsa_q10: How would you rate the global impact of stuttering on your quality of life?
common..daily_severity_submit_error: Couldn't save your check-in. Try again in a moment.
common..reading_prompt_pick_a_topic: What should your passage be about?
common..reading_prompt_topic_placeholder: Enter a topic for your passage...
common..reading_prompt_error: Could not generate a passage. Try again.
common..recording_failed: The recording didn't save. Try again or check your device storage.
common..recording_permission_denied: Camera and microphone access is needed to record.
common..session_record_intro: Record a therapy session as audio. When you stop, it uploads on its own and a draft report is generated. No need to assign it to a patient here.
common..session_record_consent_check: I have the patient's consent to record this session.
common..session_record_hint_background: Recording keeps going if you lock your phone or switch apps. It stops only if you force-close the app.
common..session_record_done_body: We're generating the report. It'll show up in your reports shortly.
common..session_record_queued_body: Saved on your device. It will upload and generate a report once you're back online.
common..session_record_error: Couldn't save the recording. Please try again.
common..session_record_discard_body: This recording will be deleted and won't be saved.
common..scenarios_create_failed: Failed to create scenario. Try again.
common..scenarios_quick_doctor_desc: Call to schedule a routine checkup. The receptionist will help you find an available time slot.
common..scenarios_quick_interview_desc: Practice the classic job interview opener. Give a compelling summary of your background and skills.
common..scenarios_quick_coffee_desc: Order your preferred drink with customizations at a busy café. Handle questions about your order.
common..scenarios_quick_colleague_desc: First day at a new job — introduce yourself, make small talk, and build a friendly connection.
common..scenarios_thinking_timeout: This is taking longer than expected.
common..scenarios_recording_failed: The recording didn't save. Move closer to your device and try again.
common..scenarios_transcription_failed: Couldn't detect your voice. Speak a little louder and try again.
common..scenarios_abandon_confirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete this scenario session.
common..scenarios_playback_no_audio: No audio available for this session.

common..submissions_empty_hint: Submissions will appear here as patients complete exercises.

common..consultation_exercises_delete_co: Delete this exercise? This action cannot be undone.

common..admin_feedback_empty_hint: Feedback from users will appear here.
common..admin_pilot_warning: Save these credentials now. Passwords cannot be recovered.
common..error_boundary_description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
common..accessibility_hold_to_measure: Press and hold to measure duration
common..dev_build_audio: Audio playback requires a development build
common..dev_build_video: Video playback requires a development build
common..patient_scenario_settings_descri: Tune how realistic-mode live calls behave for this patient.
common..patient_scenario_settings_vad_he: Longer windows let patients with blocks or prolongations finish their turn before the AI responds.
common..self_annotation_intro: Listen back and tap Mark whenever you spot a disfluency. You can review and add notes later.
common..self_annotation_no_markers: No markers yet. Press play, then tap Mark when you spot a disfluency.
common..self_annotation_notes_placeholde: What stood out about this moment?
common..self_annotation_video_only: {{type}} can only be marked on video recordings.
common..self_annotation_video_unsupporte: Video annotation isn't available on mobile yet. Use the desktop app for video recordings.
common..scenario_realtime_ready_subtitle: We'll connect you with the AI for a live conversation. Take your time and stutter freely.
common..scenario_realtime_headphones_hin: Headphones recommended for the cleanest audio.
common..scenario_realtime_end_subtitle: Your therapist will see this when reviewing the session.
common..scenario_realtime_fallback_gener: We couldn't keep the live call going. Switching to guided mode.
common..scenario_realtime_fallback_ws_op: Couldn't reach the AI service. Switching to guided mode.
common..scenario_realtime_fallback_ws_cl: Connection dropped mid-call. Switching to guided mode.
common..scenario_realtime_fallback_rate_: Too many calls right now. Switching to guided mode.
common..scenario_realtime_fallback_audio: Audio couldn't start on this device. Switching to guided mode.
common..scenario_realtime_fallback_sessi: This session can't run live. Switching to guided mode.
common..scenario_realtime_fallback_serve: The AI service hit an error. Switching to guided mode.
common..recent_feedback_empty_hint: Feedback from your therapist will appear here after they review your practice.
quiz..knowledge.what_is_stuttering.q3.ex: Yes, the expression of stuttering is not constant — it varies over time and across different communication situations, which is a characteristic of the disorder.
quiz..knowledge.what_is_stuttering.q4.ex: Stuttering results from the interaction of multiple factors: genetic, neurological, linguistic, temperamental, and contextual — not from a single isolated factor.
quiz..knowledge.therapy_process.q3.expla: Yes, the phases are not rigid or linear — they can overlap and are adjusted according to the objectives, needs, and evolution of each person.
quiz..knowledge.avoidance_vs_struggle.q1: Avoidance behaviors emerge as an attempt not to stutter and include avoiding words, situations, or people — they are learned responses to the repeated experience of stuttering.
quiz..ui.results.needs_review_warm: A few topics to revisit — that's part of learning. Review the explanations below and try again when you're ready.
